sentences.target: Le gendarme nous demande nos papiers.

translations.fr: Le gendarme nous demande nos papiers.
translations.en: The officer asks us for our papers.
translations.es: El agente nos pide los documentos.
translations.de: Der Polizist bittet um unsere Papiere.
translations.ko: 경찰관이 우리에게 서류를 보여 달라고 합니다.
translations.yue: 警察要求我哋出示證件。
translations.vi: Cảnh sát yêu cầu chúng tôi xuất trình giấy tờ.
translations.nl: De agent vraagt ons om onze papieren.
translations.hi: पुलिस अधिकारी हमसे हमारे दस्तावेज़ मांगता है।
translations.el: Ο αστυνομικός μας ζητά τα έγγραφά μας.
translations.nb: Politibetjenten ber oss om papirene våre.
translations.sv: Polisen ber oss om våra papper.
translations.ja: 警官が私たちに書類の提示を求めています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the subject noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of 'demande'.
Clitic personal pronoun, 1st person plural, indirect object (recipient) of 'demande'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'Le gendarme'.
Possessive determiner, 1st person plural (plural form); modifies 'papiers'.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of 'demande'.

sentences.target: Un gendarme attend près de la boulangerie.
sentences.reading: /œ̃ ʒɑ̃.daʁm a.tɑ̃ pʁɛ də la bu.lɑ̃.ʒʁi/

translations.fr: Un gendarme attend près de la boulangerie.
translations.ipa: /œ̃ ʒɑ̃.daʁm a.tɑ̃ pʁɛ də la bu.lɑ̃.ʒʁi/
translations.en: An officer is waiting near the bakery.
translations.es: Un agente espera cerca de la panadería.
translations.de: Ein Polizist wartet in der Nähe der Bäckerei.
translations.it: Un agente aspetta vicino alla panetteria.
translations.zh-Hans: 一名警察在面包店附近等候。
translations.yue: 一名警察喺麵包店附近等緊。
translations.pt: Um policial espera perto da padaria.
translations.vi: Một cảnh sát đang chờ gần tiệm bánh.
translations.nl: Een agent wacht in de buurt van de bakkerij.
translations.hu: Egy rendőr a pékség közelében várakozik.
translations.hi: एक पुलिस अधिकारी बेकरी के पास इंतज़ार कर रहा है।
translations.el: Ένας αστυνομικός περιμένει κοντά στο αρτοποιείο.
translations.id: Seorang polisi menunggu di dekat toko roti.
translations.ja: 警官がパン屋の近くで待っている。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces the subject.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of 'attend'.
Intransitive main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Adverb forming the compound preposition 'près de' meaning 'near'.
Preposition complementing 'près'; introduces the prepositional complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'boulangerie'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'de'.

sentences.target: On appelle un gendarme si ça dérape.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ a.pɛl œ̃ ʒɑ̃.daʁm si sa de.ʁap/

translations.fr: On appelle un gendarme si ça dérape.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ a.pɛl œ̃ ʒɑ̃.daʁm si sa de.ʁap/
translations.en: We call an officer if things go wrong.
translations.es: Llamamos a un agente si las cosas se salen de control.
translations.de: Wir rufen einen Polizisten, wenn etwas aus dem Ruder läuft.
translations.it: Chiamiamo un agente se le cose sfuggono di mano.
translations.zh-Hans: 如果情况失控，我们就报警。
translations.yue: 如果情況失控，我哋就會報警。
translations.ru: Если что-то выходит из-под контроля, мы вызываем полицию.
translations.pt: Chamamos a polícia se as coisas saírem do controle.
translations.he: אם העניינים יוצאים משליטה, אנחנו מזעיקים את המשטרה.
translations.tr: Bir şeyler kontrolden çıkarsa polisi ararız.
translations.vi: Nếu mọi việc vượt ngoài tầm kiểm soát, chúng tôi gọi cảnh sát.
translations.ar: نستدعي الشرطة إذا خرجت الأمور عن السيطرة.
translations.nl: We bellen de politie als het uit de hand loopt.
translations.uk: Якщо щось виходить з-під контролю, ми викликаємо поліцію.
translations.hu: Ha elszabadulnak a dolgok, hívjuk a rendőrséget.
translations.hi: अगर हालात बेकाबू हो जाएँ तो हम पुलिस को बुलाते हैं।
translations.pl: Gdy sytuacja wymyka się spod kontroli, dzwonimy po policję.
translations.el: Αν τα πράγματα ξεφεύγουν από τον έλεγχο, καλούμε την αστυνομία.
translations.nb: Hvis det kommer ut av kontroll, ringer vi politiet.
translations.id: Kalau keadaan di luar kendali, kami menelepon polisi.
translations.sv: Om det spårar ur, ringer vi polisen.
translations.ro: Dacă lucrurile scapă de sub control, chemăm poliția.
translations.cs: Když se to vymkne kontrole, voláme policii.
translations.da: Hvis det kommer ud af kontrol, ringer vi til politiet.
translations.fi: Jos tilanne lähtee käsistä, soitamme poliisille.
translations.ja: 状況が手に負えなくなったら、警察に電話します。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/generic subject pronoun; functions as the subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'On'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces the object noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'appelle'.
Subordinating conjunction introducing a conditional clause.
Demonstrative pronoun; subject of the subordinate verb 'dérape'.
Intransitive verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; in the conditional clause.

sentences.target: Les gendarmes bloquent la route ce matin.
sentences.reading: /le ʒɑ̃.daʁm blɔk la ʁut sə ma.tɛ̃/

translations.fr: Les gendarmes bloquent la route ce matin.
translations.ipa: /le ʒɑ̃.daʁm blɔk la ʁut sə ma.tɛ̃/
translations.en: The officers are blocking the road this morning.
translations.es: Los agentes bloquean la carretera esta mañana.
translations.de: Die Polizisten sperren heute Morgen die Straße.
translations.it: Gli agenti bloccano la strada questa mattina.
translations.ko: 오늘 아침 경찰관들이 도로를 막고 있습니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天早上警察正在封路。
translations.pt: Os policiais estão bloqueando a estrada esta manhã.
translations.vi: Sáng nay cảnh sát đang chặn đường.
translations.nl: De agenten blokkeren de weg vanmorgen.
translations.hu: A rendőrök ma reggel lezárják az utat.
translations.hi: आज सुबह पुलिसकर्मी सड़क को बंद कर रहे हैं।
translations.el: Οι αστυνομικοί κλείνουν τον δρόμο σήμερα το πρωί.
translations.nb: Politiet sperrer veien i dag tidlig.
translations.sv: Polisen blockerar vägen i dag på morgonen.
translations.ro: Polițiștii blochează drumul în această dimineață.
translations.da: Politiet spærrer vejen her til morgen.
translations.ja: 今朝、警官たちが道路を封鎖しています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, plural; introduces the subject noun.
Common noun, masculine plural; subject of 'bloquent'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; agrees with 'Les gendarmes'.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces the object noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'bloquent'.
Demonstrative determiner; modifies 'matin' to express time.
Common noun, masculine singular; forms a temporal NP functioning as an adverbial ('ce matin').
